projectDescription: One-way sync plugin that imports Jira issues into OmniFocus as tasks using JQL queries
keyFeatures: One-way sync from Jira to OmniFocus
JQL-based filtering to sync specific issues
Incremental and full refresh sync modes
Automatic status mapping to OmniFocus task states
Project organization based on Jira parent issues
Secure credential storage in macOS Keychain
Task deduplication based on Jira keys
publicApiSurface: Configure JIRA Sync - Setup action for credentials and settings
Sync Jira - Incremental sync for recent updates
Sync Jira Full - Full refresh sync with cleanup
